must_detect.matched_text: Conditions precedent: Compliance with the Securities and Exchange Commission, Thailand (SEC Office) and SET disclosure rules, including submission of updated board resolutions, financial statements, and an information memorandum; the issuer shall confirm no undisclosed MNPI at signing and closing.

Covenants: PDPA-compliant processing of personal data, prohibition on sharing employee or customer data outside the stated purposes, and adherence to Notification of the Capital Market Supervisory Board on acquisition/disposal of assets and connected transactions.
Employee matters: No change-in-control severance terms are included; any ESOP adjustments will follow SET/SEC guidance and will be summarized in a public board report.
